notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa steals (4) 2nd base. Isiah Kiner-Falefa to 3rd. Isiah Kiner-Falefa advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Sandy León.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Gasper GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Gasper grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson. Wilyer Abreu scores. Willson Contreras to 3rd. Masataka Yoshida out at 2nd. Mickey Gasper out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Gasper rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Gasper grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson. Wilyer Abreu scores. Willson Contreras to 3rd. Masataka Yoshida out at 2nd. Mickey Gasper out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio flies out to center fielder Michael Harris II.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Matt Olson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Matt Olson hit by pitch. Mauricio Dubón to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds out to first baseman Willson Contreras. Eli White scores. Michael Harris II to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski singles on a line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
